text: American Express shares reached an all-time high by November 12, 2025, reflecting strong stock performance. This momentum contrasts with the broader market, as the S&P 500 was down 0.1% during the same week. Market commentary indicates that price target raises have contributed to the positive sentiment surrounding the stock.

issues.explanation: The 23.3% year-to-date figure is not found in either cited chunk (C026 or C028). C026 mentions American Express is at an all-time high with price target raises but does not provide the YTD percentage. C028 discusses Dow and S&P 500 performance but does not mention American Express stock performance. While this figure appears in previously verified facts from other sections, the chunks cited in this paragraph do not support this specific claim.
issues.recommended_fix: Either cite the chunks that originally contained the 23.3% YTD figure, or add a calculation reference if this was derived from price data. Alternatively, restructure citations to include chunks that actually contain this performance metric.

C026 only references Jim Cramer's commentary on price target raises. This claim appears in previously verified facts but is not supported by the chunks cited in this paragraph.
issues.recommended_fix: Cite the chunks from the Recent Developments or Business & Competitive Analysis sections that contain information about consumer spending and travel partnership drivers, or remove this claim if no supporting evidence is available in the cited sources.

revision_history.original_text: Stock performance has been strong, with shares surging 23.3% year-to-date and reaching an all-time high by November 12, 2025. This significantly outpaces the broader market, as the S&P 500 was down 0.1% during the same week. Much of this upward movement has been driven by optimism around consumer spending and strategic travel partnerships. However, the substantial year-to-date gain suggests much of the positive news may already be reflected in the current valuation, limiting near-term upside potential.
revision_history.revised_text: American Express shares reached an all-time high by November 12, 2025, reflecting strong stock performance. This momentum contrasts with the broader market, as the S&P 500 was down 0.1% during the same week. Market commentary indicates that price target raises have contributed to the positive sentiment surrounding the stock.
revision_history.changes_summary: Removed the unsupported 23.3% year-to-date gain figure as no provided chunk contains this metric. Changed the driver of stock movement from consumer spending and travel partnerships to price target raises to align with C026 content. Removed the valuation limitation claim due to lack of supporting evidence in provided chunks. Updated text to reflect only claims supported by C026 (all-time high, price targets) and C028 (S&P 500 performance).
